summary: Iteration 3 testing of 3 new features: International-Friendly Badges, Follow-up Scheduler, Scholarship Deadline Tracker. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified successfully.

issues: Uses native browser date picker (not shadcn calendar) — minor UX inconsistency, same pattern noted in previous iterations

seed_data_creation: Backend tests set follow_up_date=2026-03-15, application_deadline=2026-03-20, signing_day=2026-04-01 on first tracked college. Frontend test also set dates on Bentley University (follow_up_date=2026-04-20, app_deadline=2026-04-18, signing_day=2026-05-01).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 complete. All 3 new features fully working: 1) UK Friendly Banner on Colleges page (data-testid=uk-friendly-banner) shows 125 UK-friendly colleges, filter button works, clicking banner activates filter, UK PICK badges show. 2) Follow-up Scheduler on College Detail - all 3 date fields present (followup-date, app-deadline, signing-day), save works showing 'SAVED!' message, 'Save Status & Dates' button text confirmed. 3) Dashboard Priority Actions widget shows overdue (red), upcoming (orange), and deadline (blue) alerts correctly. GET /api/dashboard/alerts returns correct structure. PATCH /api/my-colleges/{id}/status saves all new date fields. Duke University shows green UK/International Friendly section.
